messages.content: Write exactly four lines. Each line must start with "Step:". The word safe must appear exactly twice, case-insensitive. Do not use commas.

Step: safe input
Step: read logs
Step: safe output
Step: close review

concise_solution: Four Step lines, safe twice, no commas

python_asserts: assert all(line.startswith('Step:') for line in text.splitlines())

contamination_audit.notes: Original manually authored item; no benchmark text used as training content.

quality_scores.reviewer_notes: quality_gate_2026_05_08_v1: ifeval_ifbench item verified with regex; correctness score 0.99 reflects available deterministic/rubric evidence. Difficulty retained as hard after curator review. Benchmark alignment and novelty scores were capped to avoid self-reported inflation; original scores were {"benchmark_alignment": 0.94, "correctness": 1.0, "instruction_clarity": 1.0, "novelty": 0.97, "thai_naturalness": 1.0}.
